hooks.command: if [ -z "$ASCEND_WIKI_MCP_TOKEN" ]; then echo '⚠️ ASCEND_WIKI_MCP_TOKEN is not set. The Ascend Wiki MCP server will not be available. Set it in ~/.zshrc: export ASCEND_WIKI_MCP_TOKEN="your-token"'; fi
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'triage-.*\.md$'; then echo '✅ Triage file updated: '"$FILE"; fi
